info.name: ETF持仓归因MVP接口测试
info.description: 测试CSV解析、持仓归因和AI复盘报告接口

exec: pm.test('返回交易记录数量', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.count).to.be.a('number'); pm.expect(json.count).to.be.greaterThan(0); });
pm.test('返回持仓和风险提示', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.positions).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(json.risk_flags).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(json.report).to.be.a('string'); });
pm.test('报告包含合规声明', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.report).to.be.a('string'); pm.expect(json.report).to.include('本工具仅用于持仓分析参考，不构成任何投资建议'); });

body.raw:
{
  "total_etfs": 3,
  "covered_stocks": 12,
  "main_exposures": ["沪深300", "港股创新药", "医药"],
  "risk_tags": ["医药行业集中", "港股风险"],
  "behavior_flags": ["单一医药方向暴露较高"],
  "total_return": -0.085,
  "main_drivers": [{"name":"医药创新药","impact":-0.062}],
  "style": "简洁中性",
  "max_tokens": 300
}

exec: pm.test('返回模型标识和报告', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.report).to.be.a('string'); pm.expect(json.model_used).to.exist; });

body.raw: {"total_etfs":5,"main_exposures":["沪深300","半导体","人工智能"],"risk_tags":["科技成长暴露较高"],"style":"详细专业","max_tokens":400}

exec: pm.test('返回暂无提示和免责声明', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.report).to.include('暂无'); pm.expect(json.disclaimer).to.include('不构成任何投资建议'); });
